releaseNotes:
Release v0.9.0

New Features:
- Parallel Dispatcher node: concurrent subgraph execution with input-order results, max_parallel cap, retry semantics, and aggregate_by_key (PS-146)
- License Tokens for CI and headless use: create/list/revoke from the Licensing modal, SUCCESSION_LICENSE_TOKEN validation path
- Execution history: engine tracks live per-node execution state; new CLI last-execution command and MCP get_last_execution_data returns real per-node data (PS-154)
- CLI --json flag for health-check
- SUCCESSION_SECRET_* environment variables merged into the secrets map

Bug Fixes:
- Email verification is sent on registration and reliably advances past the verify screen
- Parallel Dispatcher: always-firing Succeeded/Failed outputs (PS-146)
- List Operations: pop/popFront output wrapped in standard packed envelope; list operation parse fix
- Interactive login stays primary; license token is used only as fallback
- Skip tray icon on display-less Linux instead of aborting
- Assistant tab fails closed while license check is pending

Improvements:
- Security hardening: five audit findings closed (fs path policy, admin delete gate, redaction), license token endpoints hardened, secrets redacted in execution records, token cache bound to signed token identity
- Licensing modal restyled with settings-style sections; premium locks on License Tokens section and Assistant tab
- Stacked dashboard card header for long graph names
